items.definition_en: Graduation is a ceremony when you finish school or university.
items.example_en: Her whole family came to her graduation.

items.definition_en: A job interview is a meeting where someone applies for a job.
items.example_en: He was nervous before his job interview.

items.definition_en: A retirement party celebrates a person finishing their career.
items.example_en: The company held a retirement party for Ms. Lee.

items.definition_en: A housewarming is a party to celebrate moving into a new home.
items.example_en: We invited friends to our housewarming.

items.definition_en: A baby shower is a celebration before a baby is born.
items.example_en: She received many gifts at her baby shower.

items.definition_en: A farewell party is a gathering to say goodbye to someone.
items.example_en: His friends threw him a farewell party before he moved.

items.definition_en: An engagement party celebrates a couple agreeing to marry.
items.example_en: Their engagement party was in a beautiful garden.

items.definition_en: A fundraiser is an event held to collect money for a cause.
items.example_en: The school organized a fundraiser for new books.

items.definition_en: A book launch is an event to present a new book.
items.example_en: The author signed copies at her book launch.

items.definition_en: A reception is a formal event to celebrate something special.
items.example_en: They enjoyed dancing at the wedding reception.

items.definition_en: A networking event helps people meet for business purposes.
items.example_en: She found a new job at a networking event.

items.definition_en: A press conference is a meeting to give news to reporters.
items.example_en: The mayor spoke at a press conference.

items.definition_en: A job fair is an event where employers offer job opportunities.
items.example_en: He handed out résumés at the job fair.

items.definition_en: Quiz night is an event where people play quiz games together.
items.example_en: Our local pub hosts a quiz night every Thursday.

items.definition_en: A midterm exam is a test taken in the middle of a course.
items.example_en: She started studying early for her midterm exam.

items.definition_en: A protest march is a public demonstration against something.
items.example_en: Hundreds joined the protest march downtown.

items.definition_en: A talent show is an event where people perform skills.
items.example_en: Children sang and danced at the school talent show.

items.definition_en: A memorial service is a gathering to remember someone who died.
items.example_en: The community held a memorial service for the teacher.

items.definition_en: A sports day is a special day with athletic activities.
items.example_en: Our school’s sports day is held each spring.

items.definition_en: A release party is a celebration for a new product or album.
items.example_en: The band played live at their album’s release party.
